data.title: Biomerica’s inFoods® IBS Data Accepted for Presentation at Digestive Disease Week 2026
data.description: A presentation on real-world clinical experiences regarding a new IBS-specific guided diagnostic therapy will take place at the largest GI medical conference in the world, scheduled for May 2-5, 2026, in Chicago. The event will provide insights into the outcomes and effectiveness of this novel approach in managing Irritable Bowel Syndrome. Experts will share their findings and data from practical applications, offering valuable information to healthcare professionals attending the conference. This presentation aims to contribute to the advancement of knowledge and potential improvements in the treatment of IBS.

data.title: Cove Kaz Capital Group Completes Financial Transaction to Acquire Majority Ownership in Tungsten Joint Venture in Kazakhstan
data.description: A new partnership has been established between Cove Kaz Capital Group and Kazakhstan's National Mining Company Tau-Ken Samruk. The joint venture, with a split ownership of 70% by Cove Kaz Capital Group and 30% by Tau-Ken Samruk, has been finalized. This collaboration brings together significant resources and expertise from both entities, showcasing a promising venture in the mining sector.

data.title: Silvercrest Establishes Atlanta Office, Hires Brittain Prigge
data.description: Brittain Prigge has recently joined Silvercrest to enhance the firm's footprint in a rapidly expanding wealth market in the country. This move is aimed at solidifying Silvercrest's position in a market that is experiencing significant growth.

data.title: DELPHX ANNOUNCES CLOSING OF NON-BROKERED UNIT PRIVATE PLACEMENT
data.description: DelphX Capital Markets Inc., a company listed on the TSXV as DELX and OTCQB as DPXCF, recently closed a non-brokered private placement announced on April 22, 2026. The placement involved the issuance of 3,000,000 units at a subscription price of C$0.04 per unit, resulting in total gross proceeds of C$120,000. Each unit comprises one common share and one common share purchase warrant. The warrant allows the holder to buy one common share at a price of $0.08 within two years from the date of issuance.

data.title: Sage Deepens Collaboration with AWS to Fast-Track Agentic AI for Small and Mid-Sized Businesses
data.description: Sage has extended its partnership with AWS to bolster AI-driven financial management, facilitate cloud transitions, and introduce fresh offerings in the AWS Marketplace.

data.title: HII Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Newport News, Virginia, HII (NYSE: HII) revealed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.38 per share. This dividend is set to be distributed on June 12, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on May 29, 2026.

data.title: CFO Role Expands as Growth, Transformation and AI Agendas Converge, Oliver Wyman Forum and New York Stock Exchange Survey Finds
data.description: In New York, the Oliver Wyman Forum, the think tank of Oliver Wyman, a renowned management consulting firm under Marsh (NYSE: MRSH), has shared results from its first-ever CFO Agenda survey. Developed in partnership with the New York Stock Exchange, the survey gathered insights from close to 500 Chief Financial Officers (CFOs), encompassing about 12% of the worldwide market capitalization. The survey highlights that CFOs are increasingly involved in influencing strategy and allocating capital, showcasing their expanding responsibilities in today's business landscape.

data.title: Hyperfine Swoop® System Introduced as India’s First Portable MRI for Bedside Brain Imaging at the Country’s Leading Medical Institution
data.description: AIIMS in New Delhi has recently started utilizing the Swoop® system for clinical purposes, marking a significant milestone as the first hospital in India to introduce bedside MRI technology.

data.title: Enigma Networks Completes SOC 2 Type I Examination as Enterprises Seek Continuous Governance of Internal Network Trust
data.description: Enigma Networks®, a leader in Zero Trust for Internal Networks (ZTNX), has successfully concluded its SOC 2® Type I examination by an independent third-party audit. The audit confirms that Enigma Networks has integrated security controls and organizational protocols necessary for safeguarding customer data and enterprise environments on a large scale. This achievement underscores the trust enterprise security teams place in Enigma AI.

data.title: New Study Highlights Societal Optimism Toward Breakthrough Science, and Rising Anxiety About How Fast the World Is Changing
data.description: A recent study conducted by Leaps by Bayer and BCG has uncovered diverse trends regarding public perception of groundbreaking science in China, Germany, and the United States. The study compares attitudes towards innovative science in these countries.
